_comment: Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Clinic based therapeutic interventions of ENT/ : Clinic based therapeutic interventions of ENT_Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + Clinic based therapeutic interventions of ENT_PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists).
condition: Clinic based therapeutic interventions of ENT
source_files: Clinic based therapeutic interventions of ENT_Medco.pdf
Clinic based therapeutic interventions of ENT_PPD.CPD.pdf
clinical_indications: Purulent or other collected fluid from abscesses and post-surgical sites (for pathological/microbiological evaluation and relief from pressure effect)
Localized deep neck space abscesses (e.g., quinsy)

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the day care procedure
Nasoendoscopy/ radiology/ audiometry findings to justify the need for Procedure

claim.label: Clinical notes detailing signs and symptoms, treatment given
Post procedure clinical picture (wide bore aspiration) and radiology (optional, wide bore needle aspiration)

ppd_preauth.q: Were the Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the day care procedure submitted?
Was the Nasoendoscopy/ radiology/ audiometry report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Was clinical notes detailing signs and symptoms, treatment given are submitted?
Was Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes submitted?
Was the Post procedure clinical picture (wide bore aspiration) and radiology (optional, wide bore needle aspiration) submitted?
Was the discharge summary report submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes or nasoendoscopy/radiology/audiometry report not indicative of the wide bore needle aspiration procedure.
Clinical notes for pre-authorization missing or incomplete for wide bore needle aspiration.
Nasoendoscopy/radiology/audiometry findings to justify wide bore needle aspiration procedure missing at pre-authorization.
Post-procedure clinical picture or radiology for wide bore needle aspiration not submitted.
Procedure note/operative note for wide bore needle aspiration missing at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, examination.

Wide bore needle aspiration is the procedure of aspirating purulent or other collected fluid from abscesses and post-surgical sites for pathological/ microbiological evaluation and relief from pressure effect.
Common indications are localized deep neck space abscesses (e.g, quinsy) and post-surgical seroma.
Radiology is advisable to confirm the diagnosis prior to wide bore needle aspiration.
